cases.input: Validate the architecture artifacts for our new order management system. We have design.md, context.md, diagrams.md, api-contracts.md, and tasks.md ready for review.
cases.context: spec/design/ directory with all required artifacts, stack-select ADR completed, requirements document available, Azure stack, .NET 9

cases.input: Run a completeness audit on our architecture design. Check that all required sections exist and NFR targets are traceable from requirements through to the design.
cases.context: design.md with sections 1-7, NFRs defined in requirements doc, C4 diagrams present, API contracts for 3 endpoints, no test strategy section

cases.input: Check consistency across our architecture artifacts. We suspect the component names in the diagrams don't match the design doc, and some ADR decisions may conflict with the stack-select choice.
cases.context: Multiple artifacts: design.md, context.md, 5 ADRs, stack-select decision (Stack B), API contracts, sequence diagrams

cases.input: Apply an adversarial (skeptical-CTO) lens to our microservices architecture design. Challenge our assumptions on scale, security, cost, and operability.
cases.context: Microservices design for 10x current scale, Azure AKS, Cosmos DB, 5 services, STRIDE-A threat model not yet completed, cost model in design

cases.input: Synthesize the findings from three auditors who reviewed our architecture artifacts. Completeness found 2 missing sections; Consistency found 1 conflicting ADR; Adversarial found 3 scalability concerns.
cases.context: All three auditor findings available, artifacts: design.md, api-contracts.md, 3 ADRs, stack-select decision
